---
title: "Whispers of Love and Wisdom. Collected and arranged by Annie Cazenove; with a preface by C.M. Yonge."
---

## Whispers of Love and Wisdom. Collected and arranged by Annie Cazenove; with a preface by C.M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Non-fiction: critical preface
**Format:** Preface to book

**Publisher:** Griffith and Farran, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
